archetype: Archetype 7 (Electric & Neon) merged with Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast)
design_philosophy: E1 The Anti-AI Designer - Avoid standard SaaS bloat. We use pure terminal-inspired technical aesthetics mixed with premium architectural spacing. Focus on depth via matte black, glowing neon accents only where action is required, and brutalist structural grid lines.

rules.anti_pattern_banned: Do not use Inter, Roboto, or standard sans for headings.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: The Control Room Grid. Use strict grid lines, visible borders on containers.
spacing_and_layout.padding: Generous spacing. Cards must use p-8 to p-12. No cramped content.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: Sharp or minimal. Use rounded-none or rounded-md (max 8px). Do not use large pill shapes except for the main CTA button.
spacing_and_layout.surfaces: Retro-Futurism/Terminal. Background #0A0A0F with 1px border-subtle. Use Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/[0.02]) only for floating elements like the Sticky Navbar.

components_strategy.icons: Use lucide-react (stroke-width 1.5) or install @phosphor-icons/react for a more technical/duotone feel.
components_strategy.navbar: Sticky at top (z-50). Starts transparent, becomes bg-[#0A0A0F]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-border_subtle on scroll. Must have Desktop links + right-aligned CTA. Hamburger for mobile.
components_strategy.hero: Full viewport height. Background is deep dark gradient with abstract neon traces. Overlay text. Dual CTAs (Primary Teal, Secondary outlined).
components_strategy.cards: 1px border, flat background. On hover: border glows teal or violet via box-shadow, slight negative Y translation (-translate-y-1).
components_strategy.timeline_how_it_works: Horizontal flex on desktop, vertical border-l on mobile. Use glowing dots for step markers.
components_strategy.cta_buttons: Primary CTA MUST use Teal (#00D4AA) background, pure black text (for contrast), font-bold, hover:brightness-110, hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,212,170,0.4)].
components_strategy.forms: Email capture must use Shadcn Input but overridden: bg-transparent, border-b-2 border-x-0 border-t-0 border-white/20 rounded-none focus:border-teal-green. Terminal style.
components_strategy.data_test_ids: Mandatory on all interactive elements. E.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='email-submit-button'.

motion_and_interactions.scroll_animations: Use framer-motion 'whileInView' with 'viewport={{ once: true, margin: "-100px" }}'.
motion_and_interactions.staggered_lists: Problem Punch and Offer Stack items must fade/slide in sequentially.
motion_and_interactions.reduced_motion: All framer-motion animations should respect user preferences natively or via a custom hook.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Every card, link, and button needs a distinct hover state. Links must shift text color from muted to white.

hero_background.description: Dynamic neon lines against a dark background, representing automation energy. Apply mix-blend-screen or opacity-20 overlay.

demo_project_1.description: Dashboard analytics on a laptop screen.

systems_texture.description: Server rack lights. Use in the 'Email Capture / Steal Our Systems' section as a low-opacity background texture.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Google Fonts 'Unbounded' and 'JetBrains Mono' and configure them in tailwind.config.js.
Build the hero section with a dark overlay over the 'hero_background' image to ensure H1 legibility.
Ensure the primary CTA ('Book a Strategy Call') is the vibrant Teal Green #00D4AA, with high-contrast dark text inside.
Construct the 'Problem Punch' section using a staggered grid layout.
Implement the 'Steal Our Systems' email capture using a minimalist terminal-style form.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, form inputs, and navigation links.
Store the email capture submissions by simulating a MongoDB API call or properly wiring it up to the backend.
